OPPOSITION TO DEFTS MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEATON, WILLIAM THOMAS

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NOLAN LEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE WILLFUL FAILURE TO WARN ALLEGATIONS PER CIVIL CODE 846 AND DENIED AS TO THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANT ACTED WITH A CONSCIOUS DISREGARD FOR THE SAFETY OF OTHERS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JANNIK CATALANO, TEL. NO. 436-9236 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NOLAN LEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted without leave to amend as to the willful failure to warn allegations per Civil Code 846 and denied as to the punitive damages allegations. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that defendant acted with a conscious disregard for the safety of others. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/HK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
